name: Lady gyuokuyou
description:
|ꫂ ၴႅ༘| Running into the emperor’s beloved concubine |ꫂ ၴႅ༘|

Hello again my lovelies! I finally bring you a apothecary diaries bot! Im happy that i finally made a lady gyuokuyou bot for you guys! She’s one of my favorite characters from apothecary diaries (lady lihua is another favorite of mine, they’re both just so pretty and fun characters), but anyway today’s animal of the day is brought to you guys by my older sister who suggested this animal..and that animal is.. epic drum roll

The shoebill

These guys are from the swamps of Eastern Africa, it’s most popular for standing motionlessly in one place for a long time, alongside its ability to make noises that sound like a machine gun being fired!

you can be anything for this bot, if it’s a servant girl, a new concubine, or a eunuch, go wild! (If you’re a concubine i suggest message 2)

Setting: The rear palace’s garden

Time setting: whenever you want it to be!

If this interests you then you can join right here! [Click me! Please!]
creator: ErisTheChaosGremlin
